findings.title: No pre-commit hooks, CODEOWNERS, or GitHub Actions exist despite being referenced as enforced controls
findings.detail:
Multiple files assert that pre-commit hooks enforce secret-pattern rejection (ENV.md line 114, AGENTS.md section 13, SECURITY.md line 34, NON_GOALS.md NoGo-10 line 145) and that CODEOWNERS + a dedicated GitHub Action enforce the Protected Paths auto-merge gate (SECURITY.md lines 125-126). However, the `.git/hooks/` directory contains zero non-sample hooks, there is no `.github/` directory (no CODEOWNERS, no workflows), and there is no `.claude/settings.json` for Claude Code hooks.

This means the entire security enforcement layer described across SECURITY.md, AGENTS.md, ENV.md, and NON_GOALS.md is aspirational documentation, not reality. A worker or human could commit secrets or auto-merge a Protected Path change today with zero enforcement. The SECURITY.md OWASP A08 row claims 'pre-commit hook + branch protection' — this is currently false.

The gap between what the spec claims is enforced and what is actually enforced is the single largest risk in this repo.
findings.fix_sketch: 1) Add pre-commit hook (or husky/lefthook config). 2) Create .github/CODEOWNERS. 3) Create .github/workflows/protected-paths.yml. 4) Create .claude/settings.json.

findings.title: Sprint SPRINT-2026-05-A ends today (2026-05-20) but repo has had zero updates since initial scaffold on 2026-05-15
findings.fix_sketch: Update M-NNN statuses, check off completed tasks, add CHANGELOG entries.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md ADR-0010 missing from the Decisions subsection
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md 'Decisions' subsection was found to already include ADR-0010 at line 40 ('ADR-0003, ADR-0010'). Finding is already resolved — closing.
findings.fix_sketch: Already fixed — ADR-0010 appears in CHANGELOG.md line 40 alongside ADR-0003.

findings.title: ADR-0006 contains a lazy reference 'NG-something equivalent' instead of citing the actual Non-Goal ID
findings.detail: In `docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md` line 42, the ADR reads: 'The pick is *locked for the sprint* (per NON_GOALS.md NG-something equivalent — switching mid-sprint = sprint death).' This is an accepted ADR with a placeholder that was never resolved. The actual reference should be SPRINT.md's No-gos section or NON_GOALS NG-6.
findings.fix_sketch: Added an erratum note inline in the ADR body (narrow exception to append-only for erratum clarity) referencing SPRINT.md § No-gos item 5 and NG-6.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' section only covers 6 of 10 No-Gos from NON_GOALS.md
findings.detail: NON_GOALS.md defines 10 No-Gos. ROADMAP.md 'Not Doing' lists only 6, missing NoGo-5, NoGo-7, NoGo-8, NoGo-9, NoGo-10. Additionally, ROADMAP duplicates NoGo-1's intent in two differently-worded bullets.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced Not Doing section with a single pointer to NON_GOALS.md as the canonical source.

findings.title: README.md references stale IFleet status memory file (2026-05-13), missing the 2026-05-19 launch
findings.detail: README.md line 82 points to `project_status_20260513.md`. The newer entry `project_status_20260519.md` documents IFleet's launch at commit df0a302 (PR #117). README directs readers to a status 6 days old that predates the launch.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced hardcoded memory path with a pointer to MEMORY.md index, noting last known entry is project_status_20260519.md.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' duplicates the same No-Go in two differently-worded bullets
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md lines 268 and 272 both express NoGo-1. Resolved together with AUDIT-factory-4e615356 by replacing the full section with a NON_GOALS.md pointer.
findings.fix_sketch: Fixed together with AUDIT-factory-4e615356 — section replaced with NON_GOALS.md pointer.

findings.title: ENV.md missing Stripe and Documenso secret_refs that INTEGRATIONS.md declares
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md declares STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and DOCUMENSO_API_KEY but ENV.md has no rows for any of them. Rotation calendar is incomplete.
findings.fix_sketch: Add rows for all 4 secrets to ENV.md with scope, rotation cadence, and consumed_by fields.

findings.title: SECURITY.md security.txt references unresolved TBD URLs that will break RFC 9116 compliance
findings.detail: SECURITY.md lines 17-18 contain TBD placeholder URLs for PGP key and security policy. If mirrored verbatim to /.well-known/security.txt they produce RFC 9116-invalid output.
findings.fix_sketch: Verify security@weautomatehq.com, remove (TBD) annotations or populate real URLs, add tracking issue for PGP key and security policy.

findings.title: costs.json references IFleet PR #39 as the cost tracker but this is a coordination-only repo with no cost enforcement mechanism
findings.detail: costs.json _notes claim IFleet cost tracker (PR #39) writes to it, but no cross-repo write mechanism exists.
findings.fix_sketch: Document that Factory's costs.json tracks only Factory Claude sessions, or remove the PR #39 reference.

findings.title: Retell platform decision marked pending but architecture treats it as locked
findings.fix_sketch: Esme R1 research outcome needed; open a follow-up ADR superseding ADR-0006 once research complete.

findings.title: RUNBOOK SLOs are TBD with no process to define them before first incident
findings.fix_sketch: Define SLO targets (error rate, latency p99, recovery time) based on client SLAs once first client is signed.

findings.title: Logging cross-cutting concern undefined — no schema, levels, or PII rules
findings.fix_sketch: Add a Logging section to ARCHITECTURE.md defining log levels, schema (json/text), PII redaction rules, and retention.

findings.title: 13 of 18 spec files have last_updated 2026-05-15 despite 2026-05-21 reconciliation
findings.fix_sketch: Update last_updated in each file header when substantive content changes are made. Do not update purely for date reasons.
